name: re-persisting when nothing changed is a cache no-op: every rule is unchanged and the file is not rewritten
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config-sync.sh" --persist --out view.yaml 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config-sync.sh" --persist --out view.yaml 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'unchanged=[0-9]+ updated=0 added=0 removed=0 wrote=0' e.txt && echo cache-noop 1>&2
